metadata.description: Scriptorium for Claude Cowork — from a half-formed research idea to a defensible literature review. Grills the topic into a researchable question, runs the lit review with full audit trail, optionally turns the finished review into a NotebookLM podcast or slide deck. Designed for doctoral researchers and grad students.

plugins.name: scriptorium-cowork
plugins.description: Cowork-only edition of Scriptorium. From rough research idea to defensible lit review: grill-me skills surface what you actually want to research, then the pipeline runs search → screen → extract → synthesize → contradiction-check → audit. Pure skills + MCP, no CLI. Every claim locator-cited, every decision logged, contradictions named instead of averaged. Optional NotebookLM publishing for podcast / deck / mind-map output.
